task.title: Self-review and fix symlink mount safety

events.content: Verified real file paths before copy operations: Verified real file paths before copy operations

raw.question: Verified real file paths before copy operations
raw.chosen: Verified real file paths before copy operations
raw.reasoning: Realpath and file-type checks on source files ensure symlinked files resolving outside the project root are skipped before anything is copied into the mount.
